texto: She walks to a tableShe walk to table She is walking to a tableShe walk to table now What difference does it makeWhat difference it make In Nature, no completenessNo sentence really complete thought Language, like woman,Look best when free, undressed.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Wang Ping: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a reflexao. O trecho “She walks to a tableShe walk to table She is walking to a tableShe walk to table now What differe…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, language, syntax pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de syntax e woman.
